    1. delEntityWithTenant(Integer, Integer)

Interface UpdateCreateDeleteWithTenantJpaRepository<T>

Type Parameters:
T -
All Superinterfaces:
BaseRepositoryCustom<T>, org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<T,Integer>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<T,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<T,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<T,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<T,Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<T>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<T,Integer>, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
AlgoAssetclassJpaRepository, AlgoSecurityJpaRepository, AlgoStrategyJpaRepository, AlgoTopJpaRepository, CashaccountJpaRepository, CorrelationSetJpaRepository, GTNetSecurityImpHeadJpaRepository, ImportTransactionHeadJpaRepository, PortfolioJpaRepository, SecurityaccountJpaRepository, StandingOrderJpaRepository, WatchlistJpaRepository
public interface UpdateCreateDeleteWithTenantJpaRepository<T> extends UpdateCreateJpaRepository<T>
The deletion of the entity will only happened when the entity belongs to a certain tenant.
